task: Document and enforce idempotency strategy now to prevent duplicates when future async/caching/background jobs (cron/queues/webhooks) are added.

phases.objective: Map relevant code paths, owners, tests, and likely blast radius without editing files.
Implement the smallest complete scoped change bundle across related files; include targeted validation.
Run verification commands matched to touched surfaces; collect concise evidence and failures.

dispatch_policy: Root compiles short Dispatch Packets per phase. Workers are leaf workers and must not invoke skills or spawn agents.
